summary: Completed the executable WorkerSpec composition gap by making the specification own the concrete workflow-fleet activity handlers and deriving SDK inputs, advertised activity identities, and the registry fingerprint from that tuple. The other six verifier backlog entries remain open and were not represented as completed.

gap_statuses.requirement: Complete the executable immutable worker specification
gap_statuses.evidence: WorkflowWorkerSpec now owns activity_handlers, derives activity_types and the fingerprint from them, and worker_runtime passes the same spec-owned handlers to Temporal Worker construction. Unit coverage asserts handler and derived-identity composition.
No change in this attempt; provenance, digest, policy permission, core compatibility, and publish-authority separation remain required.
No change in this attempt; a pure shared resolver core and cross-host parity fixtures remain required.

gap_statuses.requirement: Immutable deployment identity and rollout safety
gap_statuses.evidence: No change in this attempt; versioned deployment and stale-worker drain/exclusion controls remain required.
No change in this attempt; operator-level capability classification, budget protection, bounded diagnostics, metrics, and alerts remain required.

gap_statuses.requirement: Real deployment canary and comprehensive regression evidence
gap_statuses.evidence: No change in this attempt; parent-to-resolver Temporal and deployed-entrypoint coverage remains required.
No documentation was changed in this attempt; the named architecture, deployment, restart, and registration-failure documents remain required.

targeted_checks.notes: The repository audits passed, then /usr/local/bin/python reported: No module named pytest.

remaining_work: Implement trusted resolved-skill native binding independent of publish authority.
Extract and adopt one provider-neutral resolver core with cross-host parity fixtures.
Implement immutable/versioned rollout and stale-worker exclusion.
Add operator capability-failure classification, budget protection, diagnostics, metrics, and alerts.
Add the readiness-gating parent-to-resolver canary and required Temporal/Compose/replay/restart regression coverage.
Update the required architecture, deployment, restart, and registration-failure documentation.
environment_limitations: Focused pytest execution is unavailable because pytest is not installed in the managed runtime.
